title: Cookie Run Kingdom & More
description: This mod adds items inspired by Cookie Run Kingdom into Minecraft!
body:
This mod adds items inspired by Cookie Run Kingdom into Minecraft!

 

I do not own the right to any of these ideas, just want to add some silly items into Minecraft :)

 

Included Items:

Wafflebot Crown [Strawberry Crepe Helmet] (5 Armor, 1 Toughness): Provides damage resistance

Ancient Staff [Pure Vanilla's Staff] (5 DMG, 1 ATK SPD): Provides regeneration 1 when used, additional regeneration 2 supplied when using on another entity

More on the way!

 

Please suggest items in the comments!
